features.name: timing-driven coroutine with co_await trigger referencing vlProcess
features.description: Code should include a coroutine using co_await with a trigger() call that references vlProcess, where the coroutine function lacks vlProcess as a parameter
features.snippet: VlCoroutine f(VlSyms* vlSymsp) { co_await vlSymsp->TOP.__VtrigSched.trigger(0U, vlProcess, "@(posedge clk)", "file.sv", 131); }
